Class ProjectController

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.project.ProjectController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1") public class ProjectController extends Object
REST endpoints for projects. Access is membership-based (see ProjectService); the acting user is resolved from the authentication.
Author:
peter haller

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    ProjectController.ProjectRequest
    Request body for creating/updating a project.

    Creates a new project (the caller becomes manager and first member).

    Returns all tasks of a project (caller must be manager or member).

  • Constructor Details

    • ProjectController

      public ProjectController()

  • Method Details

    • createProject

      @PostMapping("/projects") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> createProject(@RequestBody ProjectController.ProjectRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Creates a new project (the caller becomes manager and first member).

    • getMyProjects

      @GetMapping("/projects") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Project>> getMyProjects(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Returns the projects the caller manages or participates in.

    • getProject

      @GetMapping("/projects/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> getProject(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • updateProject

      @PatchMapping("/projects/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> updateProject(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody ProjectController.ProjectRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • deleteProject

      @DeleteMapping("/projects/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteProject(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • addMember

      @PostMapping("/projects/{id}/members/{userId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> addMember(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long userId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • removeMember

      @DeleteMapping("/projects/{id}/members/{userId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> removeMember(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long userId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • transferManager

      @PutMapping("/projects/{id}/manager/{userId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> transferManager(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long userId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Hands the project over to another of its members. Allowed for the current manager and for an administrator; the designated user must already be a member (400 otherwise).

    • addResource

      @PostMapping("/projects/{id}/resources/{resourceId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> addResource(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long resourceId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • removeResource

      @DeleteMapping("/projects/{id}/resources/{resourceId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> removeResource(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long resourceId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • addDocument

      @PostMapping("/projects/{id}/documents/{documentInfoId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> addDocument(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long documentInfoId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • removeDocument

      @DeleteMapping("/projects/{id}/documents/{documentInfoId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Project> removeDocument(@PathVariable Long id, @PathVariable Long documentInfoId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • getTasks

      @GetMapping("/projects/{id}/tasks") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Task>> getTasks(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Returns all tasks of a project (caller must be manager or member).
